paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.63, representing a decrease of 0.38% from the prior close and 26.14% over the last 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions around the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. A director's resignation due to governance concerns has also been reported.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes. One new social post was added in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
